de.name: Tägliches Logistik-Briefing
de.description: Logistik-Tagesbriefing — Versand-Backlog, blockierte Aufträge, Bestände, Wareneingänge — täglich um 07:00.

prefill.name: Tägliches Logistik-Briefing
prefill.description: 3-4 wichtigsten Logistik-Themen für den Tag — Versand, Bestände, Wareneingänge.

angles: Logistik-Agent-Jobs in requires_intervention (Tracking-Push, Versand-Verzögerungs-Mail, Wareneingang-Buchung hängen)

en.name: Daily Logistics Briefing
en.description: Logistics daily briefing — shipping backlog, blocked orders, stock levels, goods receipts — every day at 07:00.

prefill.name: Daily Logistics Briefing
prefill.description: Top 3-4 logistics topics for today — shipping, stock, goods receipts.

angles: Shipping backlog (open delivery orders, oldest first)
Blocked / locked orders (shipping holds, clarification cases)
Carrier topics (trackings without update, carrier delays)
Logistics agent jobs in requires_intervention (Tracking Push, Shipping Delay Notice, Goods Receipt Posting stuck)
